blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Opened the alert rule creation form
- Wrote a clear, actionable alert rule name
- Built an alert query with the query builder
- Previewed your query results

---

### More to explore (optional)

Read more about how you can:

- [Build alert queries and conditions](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/fundamentals/alert-rules/queries-conditions/)
- [Understand alert rules](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/fundamentals/alert-rules/)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following path next:

- [Create your first alert rule - condition](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-first-rule-condition/)
